user.title: Microsoft Edge TTS
user.description: Add the Microsoft Edge text-to-speech service. No account is required.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

init.title: Edge TTS defaults
init.description: Default synthesis settings. Per-call tts.speak options always override these.

list_voices.name: List voices
list_voices.description: List every voice the Edge TTS engine can synthesize, with locale, gender and style metadata.

language.name: Language
language.description: Only return voices whose locale starts with this, e.g. "zh" or "zh-CN".

gender.name: Gender
gender.description: Only return voices of this gender.
